roles.name: Boss
roles.description: Sits at the head of the table — owns the over-arching solution and answers to no one but the family.

roles.name: Capo
roles.description: Runs the crew day to day, holds the schedule, and reports back to the Boss.

roles.name: Bookkeeper at the Bing
roles.description: Keeps the books straight — fields, layouts, profiles and permission sets.

roles.name: Earner
roles.description: Builds the score — Apex, LWC, and the platform features that bring the money in.

roles.name: Underboss
roles.description: Second only to the Boss — sets the standard across all the senior earners.

roles.name: Made Soldier — Newark
roles.description: Trusted soldier with a long résumé — handles serious customer work without supervision.

roles.name: Associate from the Esplanade
roles.description: On the way up — runs configuration and discovery under a made soldier's eye.

roles.name: Consigliere
roles.description: Trusted advisor on all things between systems — architects the spans between Salesforce and the outside world.

roles.name: Wireman
roles.description: Runs the lines — APIs, middleware, event flows under the Consigliere's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Wireman
roles.description: Learning the wires — webhooks, callouts, batch jobs, and the family patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Cleaner
roles.description: Comes in after the job to make sure nothing's left behind — finds the problems before they reach the Boss.

roles.name: Front-of-House at Vesuvio
roles.description: Runs the welcome and the message — leads all marketing craft for the family.

roles.name: Promoter at the Bing
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — knows how to fill the room every night.

roles.name: Flyer Crew
roles.description: Carries the campaign into the street — content, creative, and the daily hustle.

roles.name: Numbers Guy
roles.description: Records what's owed and what's promised — translates between the customer and the earners.

roles.name: Master Earner — Bloomfield
roles.description: Top earner stateside — builds the most complex Apex and LWC pieces, mentors the junior crew.

roles.name: Bagman from the Esplanade
roles.description: First job in the family — runs basic config and learns the trade from the senior soldiers.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: DiMeo / Soprano Crew — North Jersey Operations CRM
Lupertazzi NY — Five Boroughs Logistics Platform

dimeo-soprano-crew.name: Sit-Down at Satriale's
dimeo-soprano-crew.description: Discovery sign-off — terms agreed over capicola at the pork store.

dimeo-soprano-crew.name: Whacking the Old System
dimeo-soprano-crew.description: Build kickoff: legacy CRM gets put down behind the dumpster.

dimeo-soprano-crew.name: Audience with the Boss
dimeo-soprano-crew.description: Mid-project gate: solution review with Tony in the back of the Bing.

dimeo-soprano-crew.name: Envelope to the Capo
dimeo-soprano-crew.description: Phase invoice trigger: weekly tribute moves up the chain.

dimeo-soprano-crew.name: Made Day at the Bing
dimeo-soprano-crew.description: Go-Live: the new system is officially made — kissed and welcomed.

dimeo-soprano-crew.name: Hyper-care at the Pork Store
dimeo-soprano-crew.description: Hyper-care close: Paulie watches the floor for 30 days.

lupertazzi-ny-family.name: Commission Approval
lupertazzi-ny-family.description: Project kickoff: Five Families bless the build.

lupertazzi-ny-family.name: Crew Assembled at the Esplanade
lupertazzi-ny-family.description: Build phase: capos and soldiers staged for execution.

lupertazzi-ny-family.name: Construction Permit Cleared
lupertazzi-ny-family.description: UAT gate: Brooklyn site passes inspection.

lupertazzi-ny-family.name: Cut from the Score
lupertazzi-ny-family.description: Phase invoice: Lupertazzi takes its piece off the top.

lupertazzi-ny-family.name: Ride to the Lincoln Tunnel
lupertazzi-ny-family.description: Hyper-care close: Phil heads home over the river.

lupertazzi-ny-family.name: Final Tribute
lupertazzi-ny-family.description: Final invoice: closing envelope to the underboss.

soprano-household.name: Family Therapy Intake
soprano-household.description: Discovery: kitchen-table council on what the household actually needs.

soprano-household.name: Pool Cover Comes Off
soprano-household.description: Build: backyard project officially in season.

soprano-household.name: Carmela's Inspection
soprano-household.description: Solution review with the lady of the house — every detail checked.

soprano-household.name: Sunday Gravy Go-Live
soprano-household.description: Go-Live: the whole family eats off the new system.

soprano-household.name: Holiday Bonus Envelopes
soprano-household.description: Phase invoice: end-of-quarter tribute slipped to the contractors.

soprano-household.name: Storm Doors On
soprano-household.description: Hyper-care close: house is sealed up for the winter.

legitimate-orbit.name: Intake Session with Dr. Melfi
legitimate-orbit.description: Kickoff: confidential intake with the practice.

legitimate-orbit.name: Reservation System Beta
legitimate-orbit.description: Discovery: Vesuvio takes its first booking on the new platform.

legitimate-orbit.name: Confession at St. Hubertus
legitimate-orbit.description: Build: parish outreach module quietly absolved of its bugs.

legitimate-orbit.name: Audit by Agent Harris
legitimate-orbit.description: UAT acceptance: an FBI-grade compliance review passes clean.

legitimate-orbit.name: Vesuvio Grand Re-Opening
legitimate-orbit.description: Go-Live + handoff: Artie cuts the ribbon.

legitimate-orbit.name: Final Bill Slid Across the Bar
legitimate-orbit.description: Final invoice: tab settled, cannoli on the house.

Tony Soprano.notes: Panic attack — extended Melfi appointments, no calls.

Christopher Moltisanti.notes: Rehab in Pennsylvania — clean and serene.

Paulie Walnuts.notes: Pilgrimage to see the Virgin Mary apparition.

Big Pussy Bonpensiero.notes: Boat trip — won't be coming back.

Vito Spatafore.notes: Out of state — laying low in New Hampshire.

Phil Leotardo.notes: Recovery from heart attack — doctor's orders.

Johnny Sack.notes: Daughter's wedding — out of pocket all week.

Carmela Soprano.notes: Trip to Paris with Rosalie — long overdue.

AJ Soprano.notes: Stuck in his room — depressive episode.

Junior Soprano.notes: Green Grove — confused about the date again.

Janice Soprano.notes: Yoga retreat — finding her center, again.

Artie Bucco.notes: Sourcing trip to Naples — fresh buffalo mozzarella.

Father Phil Intintola.notes: Diocesan retreat — and a stop at the Soprano kitchen.
